name: Roasted Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon balsamic or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the tomatoes lengthways.
2. Place the tomatoes, cut side up, on a wire rack in a large baking dish.
3. Brush the cut side of each tomato with the combined olive oil, chilli sauce, and garlic mixture. Sprinkle with the combined salt and pepper.
4. Bake uncovered in a moderate oven for about 1 1/2 hours or until lightly browned and softened. Allow to cool.
5. Serve the cooled roasted tomatoes drizzled with the dressing.
Dressing:
Combine all ingredients in a screw-top jar. Shake well.
